fileContext.overview: This file contains the core logic for the CodeAtlas workflow, which analyzes source files and builds a semantic index for code understanding and navigation.

symbols.name: WorkflowOptions
symbols.purpose: Configuration options for the CodeAtlas workflow
symbols.behavior: Defines the settings for the workflow, including rate limits, file size limits, and concurrency options
symbols.limitations: Must be an object with the specified properties

symbols.name: WorkflowResult
symbols.purpose: Result object for the CodeAtlas workflow
symbols.behavior: Contains information about the workflow's progress and outcome
symbols.limitations: Must be an object with the specified properties

symbols.name: activateBranch
symbols.purpose: Activate the current branch before running the workflow
symbols.behavior: Resolves and sets the active branch, returning the branch name and current HEAD commit
symbols.returns: Object with branch name and HEAD commit
symbols.limitations: Must be called before running the workflow

symbols.name: runFullWorkflow
symbols.behavior: Analyzes all source files, builds a dependency graph, and creates a semantic index
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid LLM provider and workflow options

symbols.name: runIncrementalUpdate
symbols.purpose: Run an incremental update of the CodeAtlas workflow
symbols.behavior: Updates the semantic index with changes to source files
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid LLM provider and workflow options

symbols.name: runSingleFileAnalysis
symbols.purpose: Run a single-file analysis of the CodeAtlas workflow
symbols.behavior: Analyzes a single source file and creates a semantic index for it
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid file path, LLM provider, and workflow options

symbols.name: topologicalSort
symbols.purpose: Perform a topological sort on a dependency graph
symbols.behavior: Returns a list of nodes in topological order
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid dependency graph

symbols.name: checkCancellation
symbols.purpose: Check if a cancellation request has been made
symbols.behavior: Throws a cancellation error if the token is cancelled
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid cancellation token

symbols.name: runConcurrent
symbols.purpose: Run an array of async tasks with concurrency
symbols.behavior: Returns a list of task outcomes
symbols.limitations: Must be called with a valid array of tasks and concurrency level
